name: Chest Supported Dumbbell Row
instructions: Set an incline bench to about 30-45 degrees. Lie face down with your chest on the pad, a dumbbell in each hand, arms hanging straight down.
Retract your shoulder blades, then drive your elbows up and back, pulling the dumbbells toward your hips.
Squeeze at the top for a moment, then lower the dumbbells under control back to the starting position.
Keep your chest in contact with the bench throughout the movement to eliminate lower-back involvement.

name: Rear Delt Pec Deck Fly
instructions: Sit facing the pec deck machine with your chest against the pad. Adjust the handles so your arms are roughly parallel to the floor.
Grasp the handles with a neutral or overhand grip, arms slightly bent.
Drive your elbows back and outward in a wide arc, squeezing your rear deltoids at the end of the movement.
Return slowly to the starting position without letting the weight stack touch down between reps.

name: Dumbbell Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand about two feet in front of a bench, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Place the top of your rear foot on the bench behind you.
Lower your hips straight down until your front thigh is roughly parallel to the floor. Keep your torso upright and your front knee tracking over your toes.
Drive through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Complete all reps on one side before switching legs. Rest 60 seconds between legs, 90 seconds between sets.

name: Glute Machine
instructions: Position yourself on the glute kickback machine according to its instructions, placing your working leg against the pad.
Keeping your core braced and your hips stable, extend your leg back and upward by contracting your glute.
Hold the peak contraction briefly, then return the leg under control to the starting position.
Complete all reps on one side before switching. Avoid swinging or rotating your hips.
